title: galactites galactites
intro: Galactites galactites, also known as milk thistle broom or sticky broom, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its silymarin content, which is a flavonoid complex that has hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galactites galactites include its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Galactites galactites can be found in the form of teas, infusions, capsules, and tinctures, and are often used to support liver function and overall well-being.
